value.purpose: Creates the authenticated studio persistence client used by the live read and write paths.
value.notes: Hardened to return null instead of throwing when server-side auth client initialization fails.

value.purpose: Main operator dashboard home.
value.notes: Includes quick access into the new settings control center.

value.purpose: Primary shot workspace route.
value.notes: Empty-state copy now reflects upload, hosted-link, and sample-import reference paths.

value.purpose: Structured prompt builder, generate flow, and review stage UI.
value.notes: One of the strongest existing product surfaces.

value.purpose: Shot asset workspace UI covering private upload, hosted URL linking, and built-in sample imports.
value.notes: Now provides three asset-input paths so generation work can continue while private-upload rollout is still pending.

value.purpose: Unified shot asset endpoint handling uploads, hosted references, and built-in sample imports.
value.notes: Validates asset mode, keeps one route surface, and records activity-log events for linked or imported references.

value.purpose: Lists campaigns and now also creates campaigns through a dedicated JSON API path.
value.notes: Campaign creation now converts missing-schema PostgREST failures into a clear setup-required message instead of surfacing the raw schema cache error.

value.purpose: Operator modal for creating campaigns from the dashboard and campaigns list.
value.notes: Disabled-state messaging is now explicit about live persistence or schema readiness instead of implying a generic failure.

value.purpose: Reusable smoke-test harness for live Sora, Kling, and Higgsfield connectivity plus upload-readiness reporting.
value.notes: Used to validate real provider credentials without depending on the full signed-in dashboard workflow.

value.purpose: Refreshes Supabase auth state in middleware and protects dashboard routes.
value.notes: Hardened so bad cookies or Supabase session-refresh failures fall back to an anonymous response instead of throwing a production error page.

value.purpose: Handles BrandBuild auth email callback, verification, and magic-link redirects.
value.notes: Hardened so auth callback failures redirect back to login safely instead of falling through to the global error page.

value.purpose: Create generation jobs through the unified provider layer.
value.notes: Central path for launching provider runs from the dashboard.

value.purpose: Refresh generation status and provider outputs.
value.notes: Used for Sora refresh and generalized provider polling.

value.purpose: Normalized generation persistence, refresh, and asset sync.
value.notes: Core orchestration and storage bridge. Now persists provider_prompt_text so attached references influence Sora and Kling via normalized prompt augmentation while direct multimodal adapter wiring remains a later enhancement.

value.purpose: Server read model for dashboard data.
value.notes: Now keeps empty but valid live datasets in live mode instead of collapsing them into demo mode, while still falling back when schema reads actually fail.

value.purpose: Primary compare-outputs workspace for grouped review and selection decisions.
value.notes: Rebuilt from a flat review list into a grouped compare console with filters, previews, and focused review detail.

value.purpose: Core product read-model and workflow types shared across dashboard surfaces.
value.notes: Expanded with comparison, version-group, and handoff-package types for the reviews and assets workspaces.

value.purpose: Assets route that now fronts the library, version-group, and handoff workflow.
value.notes: Keeps the existing /dashboard/assets route stable while feeding the richer workspace model.

value.purpose: Primary asset workspace UI for browsing outputs, reviewing version groups, and preparing handoff packages.
value.notes: Now owns three views: library, versions, and handoff/export preparation.

value.purpose: OpenAI Sora provider adapter including job creation, status retrieval, and direct content retrieval.
value.notes: Now resolves completed renders to the /content endpoint.

value.purpose: Kling provider adapter.
value.notes: JWT-based live-capable adapter that still needs a validated run.

value.purpose: Higgsfield provider adapter.
value.notes: Reference-image-led live-capable adapter that still needs a validated run.

value.purpose: Product and integration readiness audit model.
value.notes: Feeds the control-center status page and now reflects that compare outputs and handoff are shipped while private uploads remain blocked without SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY.

value.purpose: Control-center UI for readiness, blockers, and architecture gaps.
value.notes: New premium settings surface for product truth.

value.purpose: Branded auth email sending hook.
value.notes: Implemented in code but not fully live until Supabase dashboard setup is completed.

value.purpose: Core schema for campaigns, scenes, shots, prompt templates, generations, assets, reviews, tags, and activity log.
value.notes: Current production data foundation.

value.purpose: Public-site sticky header and primary access CTA.
value.notes: Public access buttons now route directly to /login so small-screen users do not depend on a protected /dashboard redirect for sign-in.

value.purpose: Public-site footer navigation and access links.
value.notes: Access links now route directly to /login to keep public sign-in behavior explicit and consistent with the header.

value.purpose: Reusable cinematic media surface for the public marketing experience.
value.notes: Decorative overlays, labels, and media layers are explicitly non-interactive so they cannot steal clicks from nearby CTAs.

value.purpose: BrandBuild public homepage and premium marketing experience.
value.notes: Hero and CTA decorative overlays are now non-interactive to keep public login and workflow CTAs reliably clickable.

value.purpose: Public-site control-room preview surface.
value.notes: Background glow layer is non-interactive so preview chrome cannot interfere with nearby click targets.

value.purpose: Streams completed provider-owned media through BrandBuild for authenticated operators.
value.notes: Currently the key Sora media proxy route.

value.purpose: Centralizes rules for when generation outputs should resolve to internal BrandBuild content routes.
value.notes: Used by repository and generate APIs.

value.purpose: Creates the private assets bucket and authenticated storage policies required for operator uploads.
value.notes: Needs to be applied to the live Supabase project.

value.purpose: Creates uploaded and externally linked shot assets.
value.notes: Now supports external-link asset records in addition to authenticated private uploads.

value.purpose: Curated BrandBuild sample-reference catalog for shot quick-start imports.
value.notes: Provides built-in image and motion references that unblock generation tests before private storage rollout is finished.

value.purpose: Validation schemas for campaign creation, prompt editing, uploads, and external reference linking.
value.notes: Now validates hosted HTTPS reference URLs and built-in sample imports.

value.purpose: Built-in premium product sample reference asset.
value.notes: Used by the shot quick-start sample library.

value.purpose: Built-in rooftop lifestyle sample reference asset.
value.notes: Used by the shot quick-start sample library.

value.purpose: Built-in character continuity sample reference asset.
value.notes: Used by the shot quick-start sample library.

value.purpose: Built-in moodboard sample reference asset.
value.notes: Used by the shot quick-start sample library.

value.purpose: Preview art for the public motion-reference sample.
value.notes: Lets operators understand the motion sample before importing the linked MP4.

value.purpose: Campaigns route that drives the project list and create flow.
value.notes: Now enables creation only when the workspace is truly live and passes a setup-state message into the create modal.

value.purpose: Campaign list workspace with search, sorting, and create access.
value.notes: Now shows a setup-state warning when the live schema is unavailable instead of leaving creation affordances looking broken.

value.purpose: Single paste-ready Supabase bootstrap for manual BrandBuild schema installation on a fresh or missing-schema project.
value.notes: Includes missing legacy prerequisites, core schema, account/settings tables, storage policies, auth trigger wiring, and demo seed data.

value.purpose: App-level Vercel config declaring the intended framework preset for the deployed BrandBuild app.
value.notes: Currently declares framework=nextjs even though Vercel project inspect still reports the generic Other preset; this mismatch should be verified in the dashboard.

purpose: Canonical structured identity and repo-memory location for BrandBuild.
notes: Confirms the canonical local repo remains D:\\Playground\\brandbuild-online-repo.

purpose: Canonical current state, blockers, and next steps for BrandBuild.
notes: Now records the confirmed GitHub remote and the secondary clone created for future integration planning.

purpose: Canonical durable facts and cross-project knowledge for BrandBuild.
notes: Now records the BrandBuild GitHub remote and the Stable Diffusion integration relationship.

purpose: Canonical append-only session history for BrandBuild.
notes: Includes the repo-capture and cross-project integration session.
